hero.label: GreenSeal / EverGreenSeal Technology
hero.title: Engineered for Environments That Break Lithium
hero.desc: ABC's bipolar architecture is fundamentally different from conventional battery design. Instead of scaling consumer-grade chemistry, we engineered a platform from the ground up for large-format, mission-critical energy storage where fire risk, extreme temperatures, and environmental exposure are operating conditions, not edge cases.

cutaway_image.image_alt: Cube-shaped bipolar lead battery cutaway showing internal cell architecture
cutaway_image.quote: 54+ Patents. Zero Thermal Runaway. 15-Year Daily Cycle Life Warranty.

cees_unit.label: CEES™ 48 kWh Unit
cees_unit.title: The Core Building Block
cees_unit.desc: Every ABC deployment starts with the CEES™ cartridge. One modular unit that scales from kilowatts to megawatts.
cees_unit.image_alt: CEES™ 48 kWh battery cartridge, cube-shaped steel enclosure with CEES label
cees_unit.stacked_image_alt: Two CEES™ units stacked, showing modular deployment configuration
cees_unit.heading: CEES™ 48 kWh Cartridge
cees_unit.text_1: The CEES™ cartridge is a near-cube steel enclosure housing forty-eight 48V bipolar lead modules. 52.3 inches long, 45.8 inches wide, 80 inches tall. 3,550 lbs. IP55/NEMA3R rated. Deploys indoors or outdoors with zero HVAC, zero fire suppression, and zero climate control. Stackable up to 4 units high.
cees_unit.text_2: Backed by a 15-year daily cycle life warranty with zero augmentation required. 20-25 year design life with majority of microgrid use cases.

specs.label: Energy capacity per CEES™ cartridge. Flexible Nominal Voltage options including 48V, 192V, 288V, and 384V, from forty-eight 48V bipolar lead modules.
Ambient operating temperature range with no HVAC, no heaters, no chillers required at any point.
Thermal runaway events. Aqueous electrolyte chemistry makes thermal runaway physically impossible.
Environmental protection rating. Indoor or outdoor deployment. UL 1973 certified, UN 2800 classified.
Annual capacity degradation. No measurable fade over the 20-25 year design life.
Daily cycle life warranty on current GC battery. Zero augmentation required.
Design life with majority of microgrid use cases.
Unit weight. 52.3 inches long, 45.8 inches wide, 80 inches high. Stackable up to 4 units high.

bipolar_architecture.label: Core Architecture
bipolar_architecture.title: Bipolar Architecture Advantage
bipolar_architecture.heading: How Bipolar Lead Differs
bipolar_architecture.text_1: Traditional monopolar batteries connect cells externally using heavy bus bars and complex wiring. Each cell is a separate unit, leading to uneven current distribution, wasted space, and increased resistance. ABC's bipolar architecture stacks cells internally. Each electrode serves as both the positive plate of one cell and the negative plate of the next.
bipolar_architecture.text_2: This design eliminates intercell connections, reduces internal resistance, and creates a compact, high-voltage module that outperforms monopolar designs in every metric that matters for critical infrastructure.
list_items: Uniform current density across the entire electrode surface
Higher energy density through elimination of intercell hardware
Simpler BMS requirements due to inherent cell balancing
Lower manufacturing cost via automated stacking processes
bipolar_architecture.image_alt: ABC cube-shaped bipolar battery cell showing internal bipolar plate stacking

proprietary_tech.label: Proprietary Technologies
proprietary_tech.title: Protected by 54+ Patents Worldwide
proprietary_tech.desc: Every layer of ABC's technology stack is protected intellectual property, from the cell architecture to the manufacturing process.

items.title: GreenSeal®
items.desc: ABC's original bipolar lead battery platform. Validated across thousands of cycles and multiple deployment environments. The foundation for all ABC products.

items.title: EverGreenSeal™
items.desc: Next-generation platform for utility-scale and long-duration storage. Enhanced cycle life, higher energy density, and optimized form factors for grid infrastructure and Battery Barn deployments.

items.title: ViaLock®
items.desc: Proprietary cell-to-cell sealing technology. Creates hermetic seals between bipolar cells that withstand extreme temperature cycling, mechanical stress, and decades of electrochemical activity.

items.title: RapidFill™
items.desc: Proprietary electrolyte filling process ensuring consistent, void-free fills across every cell in the bipolar stack. Essential to manufacturing quality and throughput.

items.title: Single CEES™ Cartridge
items.desc: One CEES™ cartridge for residential backup, small commercial, or remote monitoring stations.

items.title: BoxBe Container
items.desc: 8 to 16 CEES™ cartridges in 10-foot or 20-foot ISO containers. Pre-integrated, pre-tested, transport ready.

items.title: Battery Barn
items.desc: 432 CEES™ cartridges in a 6,000 sq ft warehouse. 5 MW AC output. 4-hour duration. The largest deployment configuration.
